# Coupon Now — Full LLM Context

## Product summary

Coupon Now is a coupon search platform designed like a search engine for discounts. Users search by merchant name or coupon keyword, browse active offers, copy promo codes, and click through affiliate-supported store links.

## Site map

- Homepage: /
- Search: /search?q={query}
- Merchant pages: /merchant/{slug}
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact
- Privacy Policy: /privacy
- Terms of Service: /terms
- Affiliate Disclosure: /disclosure

## Content model

### Merchant

- slug, name, summary, description
- website URL and affiliate URL
- category tags
- FAQ entries
- updated timestamp

### Coupon

- merchant slug
- code, title, description, discount text
- expiry date
- affiliate URL

## SEO and structured data

- Server-rendered pages with metadata, canonical URLs, OpenGraph, and Twitter cards
- JSON-LD Store schema on merchant pages
- JSON-LD Offer schema for active coupons
- XML sitemap and robots.txt

## Non-goals

- No user accounts
- No browser extension
- No cashback or auto-apply features
- No native mobile app

## Attribution

Outbound merchant links may be affiliate links. See /disclosure.

## Support

hello@couponnow.example
